channel.title: Comments on: Coney Island Human Blockhead – Shmaltz Brewing, Ep. 61
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: I haven't seen these in my neck of the woods in Michigan yet. I will be looking out and my local store is great about getting requests, so hopefully I'll enjoy one of these soon!
item.content:encoded: I haven’t seen these in my neck of the woods in Michigan yet. I will be looking out and my local store is great about getting requests, so hopefully I’ll enjoy one of these soon!

item.title: By: Melissa Komadina
item.dc:creator: Melissa Komadina
item.description:
Hey all-
Thanks for give Human Blockhead a spin on the vlog and glad you enjoyed it. It certainly is a sturdy brew but interesting and surprisingly, maybe even dangerously, drinkable. Next up for us is Rejewvenator, which is a half-doppelbock, half-Belgian-style dubbel brewed with date juice. Truly a unique, delicious beer and it's out everywhere in the usual 22 oz.
L'chaim! Melissa, Shmaltz Brewing Co.
item.content:encoded:
Hey all-

Thanks for give Human Blockhead a spin on the vlog and glad you enjoyed it. It certainly is a sturdy brew but interesting and surprisingly, maybe even dangerously, drinkable. Next up for us is Rejewvenator, which is a half-doppelbock, half-Belgian-style dubbel brewed with date juice. Truly a unique, delicious beer and it’s out everywhere in the usual 22 oz.

L’chaim!
Melissa, Shmaltz Brewing Co.
